response.justification: Exceptional match with 20 years of fullstack experience significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Currently employed at re:cinq as Staff Engineer with demonstrated TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure expertise. Strong systems thinking at scale, proven architecture capabilities, and direct experience with MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes align closely with core requirements.
strengths: Exceeds seniority—currently Staff level with 20 years experience and deep fullstack track record across multiple high-scale systems
AI agent development expertise matching specific requirement—current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Proven architectural and systems thinking—microservices at millions of requests/second, design patterns, TDD practice, and multiple complex projects
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned—strong TypeScript/Node foundation present but specific framework not listed in experience
Testing framework details unclear—testing expertise evident but Jest, Vitest, Playwright not explicitly named
Secondary stack gap—Java mentioned but Kotlin (secondary requirement) not present
